description: Graduated top 5% of class with focus on Mathematics and Computer Science.
storyText: This is where it all began. A dusty computer lab, a curious mind, and a "Hello World" that changed everything. I discovered that code was more than syntax — it was power to create.

description: Focused on systems administration, networking, and introductory programming.
storyText: Two years of fundamentals. Learning how networks breathe, how servers think, and how databases remember. Every concept was a building block for what came next.

description: Specialized in software engineering and artificial intelligence. GPA: 3.8/4.0.
storyText: The university years were a forge. Algorithms became second nature. I built my first real product, won my first hackathon, and learned that the best code solves human problems.

description: AWS certifications, advanced ML courses, open-source contributions, and conference talks.
storyText: Education never stops. Every new framework, every open-source contribution, every late-night debugging session is a lesson. The classroom is everywhere.
